content.problemStatement:
Recently the company Life Ltd created a new logo for themselves. You are asked to test the design of the logo.

The logo is a 3×33 \times 33×3 square grid with 9 cells. Each cell contains some lowercase English letter. This logo will be considered good if there exist three cells in the shape of an L that contain the letter 'l' (lowercase 'L') in each of them. That is, there should be a cell with 'l', its cell directly beneath it should also have 'l', and the cell to the right of the second cell should also have 'l'.

Your task is to tell whether the logo is good or not.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains an integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of the test cases follows.
Each of the next three lines contains a description of the logo, i-th of the line contains three characters which denote the i-th row of the logo.


Output Format
For each test case, output `yes` or `no` according to the answer to the problem.

sampleTestCases.input:
3
laz
lla
aaa
ala
lla
aaa
lll
lll
lll
sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Testcase 1: The L-shaped cells with 'l' in each of them is shown in bold here:
laa
lla
aaa
